messages.content: Andrew - just wanted to say thank you for sorting out delivery of the box today and promptly dealing with our issue. My wife and I had great fun putting it together and it was a wonderful feast.  I can't wait to visit your restaurant again once lockdown is finally over.  Best regards, Chris
Happy Chinese New Year to you too
That's awesome, thanks for sorting.  Again much appreciated
Have a great Chinese new year and let me know if you have any questions whilst you navigate the box tonight
Dear Chris, a box is being hand delivered to you this morning. A full refund has also been processed
I will do everything i can for you, if you give me 30 mins to try to find a solution for you.
Thank you, much appreciated.  I would just like to know that it is definitely coming today
Dear Chris, let me find out what has happened from star chefs.com
I have spent Â£165 and so far all I have to show for it is a set of unanswered emails, a cancelled date night and no idea what is going on :(
Reaching out here hoping you can help out as I am running out of options
There is not contact details other than an email address with StarChef so no way of getting a proper response

Hi there.  I am a huge fan of your food and restaurant which is why I was very excited by ordering one of your food boxes via StarChef.  However the experience so far has been terrible.  My box was ordered for yesterday but didn't turn up.  My emails are not being responded to and I am now worried my box will not arrive today and/or it's been sitting around somewhere for 24 hours.
